post.description: Requires a secret code from environment variables

200.description: Array of users sorted by creation date

get.description: Returns the user's full profile along with all their system activity: internal requests, approval events, orders, and paginated audit logs.

requests.description: Internal requests submitted by this user

approvals.description: Approval events this user acted on

orders.description: Orders placed by this user as customer

delete.description: Soft deletes a category. Returns 409 if products are linked.

delta.description: Positive to add, negative to deduct

description.example: New commercial mall development in city center
Updated description for the mall project

get.description: Allows Admin and Store Keeper to view all submitted requests in the system. Requesters should use /requests/mine.

post.description: Create a new material request for a specific project. Accessible by Admin and Employee.

get.description: Returns a list of requests submitted by the currently authenticated user.

comment.example: Insufficient stock available for this request
All items delivered to project site

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for real-time updates (ADMIN and STORE_KEEPER only)
